method: For each of the 8 backed-up Application.coverLetter values, tested verbatim substring containment of each committed leaked fixture's (default.json, retry.json) hook_reason sentence and body first-paragraph (the fabricated-achievement span). TRUE_FIXTURE iff a fixture span is present verbatim; REAL iff only the short numeric metric phrase '3 hours'...'15 minutes' is present inside otherwise-original prose. Programmatic, reproducible (scratchpad/classify.py).

fixture_reference_spans.default.json:body_para1: My recent work centres on owning sprint cadence, PI Planning, capacity management, and executive status reporting for multiple squads. I architected test-automation strategies that cut evidence effort from roughly 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario, and delivered analytics applications with Next.js and Supabase that expose sprint velocity metrics.

fixture_reference_spans.retry.json:hook_reason: The demands this role places on mission-critical delivery ownership map directly onto how I already run programs.
